# ENT-9200

The PROVE-THE-POSITIVE fixture for ADR-GOV-0012 D3: an entity carrying a class
field set (the tradition trio) but NO `rendering_class`. After the ENT-0008…0015
backfill the whole vault carries the field, so a clean live run proves nothing
about whether the checker can see a missing one. This is the one that fires.
